demographics.audit_notes: Slightly adjusted original values to match 1990 Decennial Census data for Tract 22.21 precisely. Added new fields based on census data.

Values reflect the peak of the housing market acceleration in Austin.
Values reflect the slight market cooling in Austin during 2023.
